Patch Set 1:

Improved readibility of the hard-coded cert list ("+" were missing in the column identifiers for paths)

waiting for gating

No reason to wait for Gating - it is a documentation change only.
The page is not rendered properly - see here: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/rtdv3-global-verify-master/2037/docs/oom_hardcoded_certificates.html
